summary: The requirement focuses primarily on identifying an inaccurate statement concerning standard procedures within initial trauma care radiology protocols; among options listed, option D incorrectly suggests performing solely one type of chest x-ray without further elaboration needed due its exclusivity compared other necessary examinations such as CT scans when indicated based upon findings from physical examination results. Key point here being exclusionary nature highlighted by choice 'D'.
